prestazioni: Engine: 1.4L TSI CZDA (EA211) with a custom BorgWarner EFR 7163 turbo upgrade, supporting 320hp and 400Nm torque on E85 fuel, paired with a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel and uprated AP Racing CP6850-2600 clutch for rapid spool and drivetrain reliability.

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with 24mm front and 20mm rear adjustable camber plates, paired with SuperPro polybushings (part no. SPF1000K) for the EA211-specific subframe to eliminate flex under hard cornering.

Drivetrain: Quaife ATB helical LSD (part no. QDF7Z) for the MQB-A0 platform, combined with a custom 3.2:1 final drive ratio from a Polo GTI Cup car, and uprated GKN VL3 driveshafts to handle increased torque without failure.
estetica: Aero: Custom 3D-printed carbon fiber front splitter by Maxton Design (SK-FAB-VRS-01) with integrated dive planes, paired with a rear diffuser from a Fabia R5 WRC replica (part no. 5J0-071-141B) for aggressive downforce at high speeds.

Wheels: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 17x8 ET35 in gloss black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (215/40 R17) for maximum grip, with custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 12mm rear) to fill the arches.

Exterior: Full Respray in Lamborghini Verde Mantis (PPG DBC9200) with a matte clear coat, combined with a custom carbon fiber hood from a Fabia R5 (part no. 5J0-823-031A-01C) and rear wing from a Fabia Monte Carlo Cup car (part no. 5J0-071-141C).
